options.content: This section shows metrics the Landlord API Gateway, which is user-facing.

panels.description: Hit Rates. No data means no hits. 2xx rate = Hit - 4XX - 5XX
panels.title: API Gateway Rates

panels.description: Integration Latency is turn around time to the backend. Total Latency includes Integration Latency.
panels.title: API Gateway Latency

options.content: This section shows metrics for the Landlord Console service running in ECS.

panels.description: Task Counts for the service, ContainerInstanceCount is the number of EC2 Instances running, if any.
panels.title: Task Counts

options.content: This section shows metrics for the Landlord API service running in ECS, including the NLB, which is the target of the API Gateway.

panels.description: Task Counts for the service, ContainerInstanceCount is the number of EC2 Instances running, if any.
panels.title: Task Counts

list.description: Name of the Landlord ECS Cluster for the Console.
list.label: Landlord Console ECS Cluster Name
list.name: LandlordConsoleCluster
